body:
# Max Dalton

**Role:** Director

[Max Dalton](https://www.linkedin.com/in/max-dalton-44149488/) leads Forethought. He was previously Executive Director at the [Centre for Effective Altruism](https://www.centreforeffectivealtruism.org/). He has a first-class degree in Philosophy, Politics, and Economics from Oxford University, and an MSc in Economics, specializing in the economics of technological change.
